productDisplayName: Tantra Men's Black Sabbath Navy T-shirt
description: CompositionNavy blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and chest printFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery This simple t-shirt from tantra is not as simple as it seems. Featuring Black Sabbath and the famous four faces of Ozzy Osbourne, Tony Lommi, Geezer Butler and Bill Ward staring straight out of your tee, it's enough to make heads turn. Pair this T-shirt with shorts or three quarters and floaters for a rocking look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6'; Chest-37"; Waist-32"
